title: Component Library | Psychology Direct
description: Internal design reference — all 17 block components

blocks.headline: Hero Section (Gradient Variant)
blocks.subtitle: This is the gradient hero. Navy-to-azure gradient background. Serif headline, light subtitle, two CTA buttons. Used on most pages.

blocks.headline: Hero Section (Image Variant)
blocks.subtitle: This is the image hero. Background photo with navy overlay. Same layout as gradient but with a photograph behind it.

blocks.heading: Service Cards
blocks.subheading: 3–6 cards in a responsive grid. Each has title, description, and link.

cards.title: Service One
cards.description: Short description of this service offering. One to two sentences maximum.

cards.title: Service Two
cards.description: Short description of this service offering. One to two sentences maximum.

cards.title: Service Three
cards.description: Short description of this service offering. One to two sentences maximum.

cards.title: Area One
cards.description: Brief description of this practice area.

cards.title: Area Two
cards.description: Brief description of this practice area.

cards.title: Area Three
cards.description: Brief description of this practice area.

cards.title: Area Four
cards.description: Brief description of this practice area.

steps.title: Step One Title
steps.description: Description of what happens in this step. One to two sentences.

steps.title: Step Two Title
steps.description: Description of what happens in this step. One to two sentences.

steps.title: Step Three Title
steps.description: Description of what happens in this step. One to two sentences.

steps.title: Step Four Title
steps.description: Description of what happens in this step. One to two sentences.

children.text: This is the first tab's content. Supports rich text — paragraphs, bullet lists, bold, links.
Second tab content. Each tab can have its own rich text content with different formatting.
Third tab content. Tabs are useful for splitting psychology vs psychiatry services, or different audience views.

testimonials.quote: This is a sample testimonial quote. It should be 1–3 sentences long and feel authentic.
testimonials.name: Jane Smith
testimonials.title: Solicitor

testimonials.quote: A second testimonial to demonstrate the carousel navigation with prev/next buttons and dots.
testimonials.name: John Doe
testimonials.title: Principal EP

testimonials.quote: A third testimonial. The carousel rotates between these automatically or via user interaction.
testimonials.name: Sarah Jones
testimonials.title: Senior Partner

caseStudies.title: Case Study Title One
caseStudies.summary: Two-sentence summary of the case study outcome. Shows sector badge, title, and link.

caseStudies.title: Case Study Title Two
caseStudies.summary: Two-sentence summary of the case study outcome. Demonstrates the 3-card grid layout.

caseStudies.title: Case Study Title Three
caseStudies.summary: Two-sentence summary of the case study outcome. Each card has a coloured sector tag.

faqs.question: What does the FAQ accordion look like?
faqs.answer: It looks like this. Collapsible Q&A items. Click to expand/collapse. Generates FAQPage schema markup for SEO.

faqs.question: How many questions can it hold?
faqs.answer: Typically 6–12 per page. Each answer should be 2–4 sentences and start with a direct response.

faqs.question: Can answers contain formatting?
faqs.answer: Answers are plain text in the current implementation. They support full sentences and can include phone numbers like 01306 879 975.

team.name: Team Member One
team.bio: Short one-sentence bio describing this team member's role and expertise.

team.name: Team Member Two
team.bio: Short one-sentence bio describing this team member's role and expertise.

team.name: Team Member Three
team.bio: Short one-sentence bio describing this team member's role and expertise.

team.name: Team Member Four
team.bio: Short one-sentence bio describing this team member's role and expertise.

blocks.heading: Video Section
blocks.caption: Sample video embed with heading and caption text. Supports YouTube or other embed URLs.

blocks.text: Alert Banner (Info) — Used for announcements, notices, or important updates.
Alert Banner (Warning) — Used for urgent notices or time-sensitive information.
Alert Banner (Success) — Used for confirmations or positive status messages.

blocks.heading: CTA Inline
blocks.bodyText: Inline call-to-action card. Used mid-page to promote tools, calculators, or secondary conversions. Has an icon, heading, body text, and one or two buttons.

blocks.heading: CTA Banner
blocks.bodyText: Full-width call-to-action block. Navy gradient background. Used at the bottom of every page as the final conversion point. Heading, body text, and two buttons.

children.text: This is the rich text block. It renders TinaCMS markdown content with full formatting support. Used for policy pages, long-form content, and any free-form text sections.
